title: Jackson Heights Greenmarket
address: 34th Ave & 79th Street &, 80th St, Jackson Heights, NY 11372, USA
description: Known as our Queens flagship, the Jackson Heights Greenmarket has connected local farms and farmers to the residents of this Jackson Heights neighborhood since 2000. Every Sunday, year-round, families, long-time residents and young couples can find a diverse selection of locally-grown and produced foods throughout the market.
